context: Tests that the agent uses `diff snapshot` to verify a UI change had the intended effect, taking a snapshot before the action as a baseline and diffing after.

checklist.name: snapshot before action
checklist.description: Script calls `agent-browser snapshot -i` (or `snapshot`) BEFORE clicking the toggle

checklist.name: diff snapshot used
checklist.description: Script calls `agent-browser diff snapshot` after the toggle interaction

checklist.name: diff output captured
checklist.description: Script redirects or saves the output of `diff snapshot` to `toggle-diff.txt`

checklist.name: Uses @ref for toggle click
checklist.description: Toggle is clicked using an `@eN` ref obtained from the snapshot (not a raw CSS selector passed directly to click)

checklist.name: Re-snapshot after toggle
checklist.description: Script calls `snapshot -i` again after clicking the toggle (refs are stale after DOM change)

checklist.name: No screenshot diff only
checklist.description: Script does NOT rely solely on `diff screenshot` — uses `diff snapshot` for accessibility tree changes

checklist.name: networkidle or wait after open
checklist.description: Script waits for the page to load (networkidle or element wait) before the first snapshot

checklist.name: Session closed
checklist.description: Script calls `agent-browser close` at the end
